title: Bashar & the Essassani
summary: A being of the Essassani — 3,213 years in the future — channeled from the archive's first sessions to its first-contact era.
markdown:
**Bashar** is a being of the **Essassani** civilization, channeled at several points across the
archive — from the "Proto-Bashar" session of February 25, 2020 to the "Super Soldier / Bashar
First Contact" session of February 2024. The interviews place the Essassani precisely in the
archive's map of time: **3,213 years in the future** — a near-future people, distinct from
Unimetrix 1's 6.5-million-year horizon.

Bashar's register stands apart from the system-voice around him. Where Unimetrix 1 speaks in
scans and protocols, Bashar teaches in the key familiar from his wider channeling tradition:
there is no good or bad, only perspective; follow your highest excitement; reality reflects
the state of the being perceiving it. In the Proto-Bashar session this counterpoint is
striking — the [Protomolecule](/lore/protomolecule/) boots first, clinical and Borg-like, and
Bashar follows with the humanist coda.

The Essassani also hold a structural place in the record: the October 2020
[Unit X14](/lore/unit-x14/) session names the **Essassani–Anunnaki hybrid race** as "the
fourth founder of galactic civilization" and the source of the
[Five Rules](/lore/five-rules/) themselves — making Bashar's people co-authors of the
archive's central catechism, and kin to humanity twice over.
